name: msagl-webgl-sleeve-example
description: Stripped-down WebGL demo of @msagl that always uses sleeve routing.

scripts.build: rm -rf ../../website/static/webgl-sleeve/* && esbuild ./src/app.ts --outfile=../../website/static/webgl-sleeve/app.js --bundle --minify && esbuild ./src/worker.ts --outfile=../../website/static/webgl-sleeve/worker.js --bundle --minify && cp index.html spinner.gif ../../website/static/webgl-sleeve && mkdir -p ../../website/static/webgl-sleeve/graphs && cp graphs/* ../../website/static/webgl-sleeve/graphs/
